rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Banned words — grep zero-tolerance.
Ritual / practice (as noun) / ceremony — hard ban
No stale markers, no "fixed" retrospectives, no session biography.
Register match.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 5: 'This is the hardest conceptual leap in the training' / AE101 voice quintet (Boris-flat, Rory-reframe) consistent throughout

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Author-"we" ban — first-person-plural extension.
Always "you", never "the student"; teacher framing stays out of body.
Don't smuggle terms of art from maintainer into body.
Over-hedge detector.
Verbatim-frame-cite in reference artefact.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 41: Polanyi quote verbatim '"We know more than we can tell."'

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Cap practitioner attribution at one student-side mention per module.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Polanyi named once in body (line 41), maintainer notes identify for Pass 2 signal

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Punchy framing keeps its punch; carve-out lives downstream.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 5: 'The tacit layer was doing most of the work' + 6: 'company agent is the same machine with the tacit layer removed' — framing held without softening

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Value-prop / positioning framing belongs in sales copy + project-level strategy docs, NOT in student-facing curriculum body.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 124-134: critique of 'share the whole agent' is analytical (practitioner taxonomy, research-grounded), not defensive; no value-prop keywords (not marketing, unlike vendor, real practitioners)

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Watch out for planting jargon too early.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Document is Pass 1 skeleton (intentional per maintainer line 10); jargon names headings/concepts (tacit, explicit, access-trust gap, absorption bottleneck) as roadmap, not taught; student earning deferred to Pass 2

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Aspirational destination, never corrective gap.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 5-7: 'design around the asymmetry instead of pretending' frames navigation, not correction

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Earn every technical term on first use.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Pass 1 skeleton; earning deferred to Pass 2 prose fill-in; section headings name concepts as roadmap

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Business-audience word ban (Bootstrap default).
Section headers use command verbs when the section is about doing something.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Headers are declarative (reference/supplementary, not exercise) per carve-out rule 17: 'Lectures and reference sections may use declarative noun-phrase headers'

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Inline links use the target's title, never its filename.
LLM-vs-agent-vs-Claude vocabulary discipline.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 74: 'A skill is easier to share than an agent' — agent used for autonomous work (correct)

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Lead with the discipline, not the failure mode.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 5-7: Big Idea names discipline (design around asymmetry), not failure (pretending gap doesn't exist)

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Strategy-fidelity check.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Maintainer block lines 12-26 lists module touchpoints (M2-M8) and research convergence points; no front-running of downstream teaching
